name: fast10
description: Representative end-to-end ingest across agencies including CONAB Mercado weekly UF prices and freight. Real downloads; scope reduced via official CLI flags only.
integrity_notes: No mocks or fixtures — every dataset hits the live official source.
Same code path as production: download → flatten → parquet → catalog.ingest_*.
Reduced volume via --from/--to/--crop/--uf/--year, not skipped pipeline stages.
conab.precos-agropecuarios-semanal-uf covers portal TXT mercado path; conab.frete covers logistics IBGE grain.

excluded_from_full_catalog.reason: Full clean benchmark is documented separately; fast10 picks one representative per fetch pattern.
skipped_patterns: ibge.pam-rendimento-valor / pam-estabelecimentos — same SIDRA fetcher as pam-area-quantidade
inmet.bdmep-diario / pacote-anual-automaticas — same annual ZIP as bdmep-mensal
Remaining CONAB mercado TXT tables — precos-semanal-uf covers portal CSV; see fast10-stress for large files
conab.prohort-diario — optional stress profile (~30s download, ~1M rows)

expected_wall_clock_sec.note: 16 datasets. Dominant cost: inmet.bdmep-mensal (annual ZIP). conab.frete and precos-semanal-uf add ~15s combined.
